title: bothriochloa laguroides subsp. torreyana
intro: Bothriochloa laguroides subsp. torreyana, also known as Torrey's blue grama, is a type of grass native to North America. It is a perennial plant with several medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Torrey's blue grama include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
